recent_no_license_projects.name: adbpg-mcp-server
recent_no_license_projects.summary: AnalyticDB PostgreSQL MCP Server serves as a universal interface between AI Agents and AnalyticDB PostgreSQL databases. It enables seamless communication between AI Agents and AnalyticDB PostgreSQL, helping AI Agents retrieve database metadata and execute SQL operations.

recent_no_license_projects.summary: Fast, offline access to comprehensive geographic data for countries, subdivisions, and cities. Built on ISO 3166 and GeoNames datasets with support for exact lookups, filtering, and fuzzy search.
